text: There is an unsettling stillness in these dimly lit and sterile spaces. The glass doors and emergency equipment suggest that I am in a modern, impersonal building—perhaps an office or a research facility. The acronyms on the wall evoke the spirit of innovation, but the darkness makes everything feel abandoned or paused, as if the drive of progress has been interrupted. Standing alone here, I feel curious but slightly uneasy, as though I am waiting for something or someone to break the silence, to add meaning to this emptiness.
